para_trans: Regarding administrative transfers of Assistant Professors, Group-A in Government Colleges / Institutions under Directorate of Higher Education in the year 2026.
Department of Higher and Technical Education
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. TRANSFERENCE-2026 / Q.No.41 / E-1731078 / MASHI-1

With the approval of the Authority competent to make transfers in accordance with the provisions of the Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delays in the Performance of Government Duties Act, 2005, the following Assistant Professors, Group-A Cadre Teachers in Government Colleges / Institutions under the Directorate of Higher Education are being transferred for administrative reasons to the College / Institute indicated in column No. 5 in front of their name.
table_trans: Government Institute of Juridical Sciences, Mumbai
Government Vidarbha Institute of Science, Amravati
Basantrab Naik Government Institute of Arts and Social Sciences, Nagpur

para_trans: 2.The said orders shall come into force with immediate effect.

3. The Principal / Director concerned shall immediately relieve the transferred faculty to join the place of transfer. Also, the faculty concerned should immediately transfer from the existing college / institution to the college / institution in which they are posted.

4. The Principal / Director concerned shall appoint the transferred faculty without delay on their retirement from the concerned college / institution. The principal / director concerned is liable for non-acquisition of teachers who have come to join.
table_trans: Sarkarokoy Vidarbha Institute of Knowledge Science, Amravati
Sarkarokoy Vidarbha Vigyan | Institute of Science, Amravati
Government College of Knowledge Science, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar
Government Vidarbha Institute of Science, Amravati
Basantrabhav Naik Government Institute of Arts and Social Sciences, Nagpur

para_trans: In the event of payment of salary and allowances without SOA working during the waiting period, the Principal / Director concerned will be held responsible. Also, no leave of absence shall be granted to such teachers during the period from discharge to joining the place of transfer.

The period of assumption of office shall be admissible to the transferred faculty as per the provisions of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Period of assumption of office, non-acceptance of service and Provisions for period of suspension, dismissal and removal from service) Rules, 1981, as per the extant rules of the Government, for joining the place of transfer. Those concerned should note that their period of absence will count as a "non-deceasing day" if they do not join during the permissible tenure of office.
The Director of Higher Education, Pune should ensure that the salaries of the transferred teachers for the next month (for the month of July) are drawn from the transferred college itself.
The Director of Higher Education, Pune, shall submit the performance report on the transfer order to the Government within 15 days.
8. The said Government Order shall be issued by the Government of Maharashtra.
